titel: Report on the allocation of funds from the General Legacy Fund during the 2024 fiscal year.
html: This document provides an overview of the management of the General Legacy Fund and a report on how the Legacy Fund Delegation has distributed funds from the fund during 2024. Furthermore, the government outlines its assessment of the Legacy Fund Delegation's activities and development, and analyzes the distribution of support within various areas. The document also specifies the future direction of support from the General Legacy Fund and the areas that, according to the government, should be prioritized when the Legacy Fund Delegation makes decisions about funding.
